shortDescription: Contemporary 3-bedroom apartment in Bathurst Quay with designer finishes and vibrant neighbourhood.
fullDescription: Welcome to 209 Fort York Boulevard, Unit 870 in the vibrant Bathurst Quay neighbourhood. This contemporary apartment features a thoughtfully designed layout that maximises natural light. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen is a chef’s dream with quartz countertops, a large island, and high-end stainless-steel appliances. Upstairs, 3 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. A private outdoor space — perfect for morning coffee or summer entertaining — completes the package. Enjoy a 90+ walk score with parks, cafes, schools, and transit all within minutes.
keyFeatures: Close to waterfront trails and cycling paths
Updated kitchen with quartz counters and soft-close cabinetry
